jfo.title: Joint Fires Observer
jfo.text: Trained observer who identifies targets and coordinates fires support.

jtac.title: Joint Terminal Attack Controller
jtac.text: Controls close air support and terminal attack operations.

gpo.title: Gun Position Officer
gpo.text: Responsible for overseeing indirect fire positions and operations.

fm.title: Fire Mission
fm.text: A request for fire support on a designated target.

gr.title: Grid Reference
gr.text: Map coordinate reference used to identify locations.

alt.title: Altitude
alt.text: Height above a reference level, usually sea level.

dc.title: Danger Close
dc.text: Fire support delivered close to friendly forces.

vt.title: Variable Time (Airburst)
vt.text: Fuze setting that detonates above ground for airburst effect.

amc.title: At My Command
amc.text: Fires are held until explicit authorization is given.

lz.title: Landing Zone
lz.text: Designated area for helicopter landing or extraction.

isr.title: Information, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance
isr.text: Collection of intelligence through observation and sensors.

nai.title: Named/Numbered Area of Interest
nai.text: Area designated for focused observation or intelligence collection.

he.title: High Explosive
he.text: Explosive munition designed for blast and fragmentation effects.

wp.title: White Phosphorus
wp.text: Incendiary munition used for marking, smoke, and suppression.

smk.title: Smoke
smk.text: Munition used to obscure vision or mark positions.

illum.title: Illumination
illum.text: Munition that lights up an area for visibility.

ip.title: Initial Point
ip.text: Navigation reference point used to begin an attack run.

fires-net.title: FIRES NET
fires-net.text: A dedicated frequency for JFO/JTAC and fire support coordination. Others remain off this net.

at-my-command.title: AT MY COMMAND
at-my-command.text: Fires are only executed when the controlling authority gives explicit permission.

cancell-at-my-command.title: CANCEL AT MY COMMAND
cancell-at-my-command.text: Removes hold restriction and allows supporting units to engage when ready.

repeat.title: REPEAT
repeat.text: Requests re-engagement of the last fire mission. Do not use for transmission repeats.

check-fire.title: CHECK FIRE
check-fire.text: Immediate stop to all firing activity.

cancel-check-fire.title: CANCEL CHECK FIRE
cancel-check-fire.text: Authorizes resumption of firing after a check fire order.

cleared-hot.title: CLEARED HOT
cleared-hot.text: Authorization for air assets to engage designated targets.

msr.title: MAIN SUPPLY ROUTE
msr.text: Primary logistics route used for movement of forces and supplies.

asr.title: ALTERNATIVE SUPPLY ROUTE
asr.text: Secondary route used when main supply routes are unavailable.

lase-lasing.title: LASE / LASING
lase-lasing.text: Use of laser designation to mark targets or locations.

rest.title: REST
rest.text: Pause in operations allowing crews to recover and stand down.

continuous-fire.title: CONTINUOUS FIRE
continuous-fire.text: Maintain fire until ammo is expended or a stop order is given.

gridref.title: Grid Reference
gridref.text: Map coordinate system used for precise location reporting.
